About Me

Gurmeet Singh — Engineer Poet and Emerging Hindi Poet in Delhi NCR

Gurmeet Singh is a rare fusion of logic and lyricism — a software engineer by profession and a Hindi poet by passion. His life is a testament to the harmony between technology and creativity, showing that analytical thinking and poetic expression can coexist beautifully. Recognized as a poet in Delhi NCR, a poet in Ghaziabad, and a kavi at Infosys, Gurmeet inspires countless emerging poets and literature enthusiasts.

Roots and Early Life — From Kheri Khushnam to Ghaziabad

Born in 1992 in the quaint village of Kheri Khushnam, Shamli district, Gurmeet grew up in a middle-class family where values like perseverance, discipline, and curiosity were deeply instilled.

Life changed dramatically when he joined Vishesh Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kamla Nehru Nagar, Ghaziabad. Moving from a UP Board school to a CBSE school was a significant academic and cultural shift. As a Hindi-medium student, he was advised to choose Hindi as a subject, but Gurmeet’s heart was set on Computer Science. His decision to follow his passion, despite doubts, laid the foundation for his journey as an engineer poet.

The Turning Point — Challenges and Resilience

The transition from Hindi-medium UP Board education to English-medium CBSE curriculum in Class 11 was demanding. Gurmeet, a bright student in Hindi, had to adapt to a completely new learning environment. Through persistence, countless late-night study sessions, and unwavering determination, he not only adapted but excelled, proving that courage and commitment can overcome any obstacle.

Academic and Professional Journey

Education

B.Tech in Computer Science

KIET Group of Institutions, Ghaziabad

Pursued engineering from one of Delhi NCR’s top engineering colleges. Founded institutional literary groups and embedded technology mindsets alongside artistic endeavors.

Corporate Leadership

Project Manager

Infosys Limited (Joined 2015)

Trained at the renowned Mysore campus. Currently managing complex IT project governance and leadership. Infuses identical structural creativity into both software platforms and lyrical systems.

Literary Contributions

KIET-Kavyanjali & Infosys Poetry Clubs

✍️

KIET-Kavyanjali (2013)

Founded and served as president to cultivate a vibrant literary club promoting Hindi literature among technology students.

🏢

Infosys Pune (2016)

Extended the poetic vision into the corporate workspace, establishing Kavyanjali for local engineering units.

🎙️

Infosys Noida (2023)

Fostered open mic cultures and comprehensive creative circles, securing deep recognition as a signature corporate advocate.

The Poet Within

Gurmeet’s poetry is simple, evocative, and deeply reflective. Drawing inspiration from Kabir and Tulsidas, his work touches on love, nature, society, and personal introspection. As one of the emerging poets in Delhi NCR and Ghaziabad, he has captivated audiences at festivals, cultural gatherings, and corporate events.

A Space Where Words Come Alive

For Those Who Appreciate Hindi Poetry

Gurmeet’s blog offers a space where technology meets tenderness, and logic meets lyricism. Explore unique collections ranging from the serene fields of Shamli to the dynamic boardrooms of Infosys.

Visit the Poetry Blog

Each poem is a reflection of life, a conversation with society, and an invitation to feel deeply.

✨ A Final Thought

"Between algorithms and verses, I discovered balance. Between logic and emotion, I found poetry. And through poetry — I found myself."

Gurmeet Singh Portfolio

Showcasing specialized solutions in tech enterprise systems infrastructure management coupled with fine lyrical craft works.
